message:
Command `# utime: 5516 seconds = 91 minutes of CPU time. 
# VmRSS: 732MB but no ODB loaded yet (no file FDs).
# It's burning CPU without reading ODB - seems like it's loading/linking libs or
# possibly stuck in an infinite loop during io.tcl setup.
#
# Let's check if the CURRENT_ODB env var is set correctly for antenna check step
grep "CURRENT_ODB\|SAVE_ODB" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/_env.tcl | head -3` executed with exit code 0.
